title: {YTP} ~ Bill Nigh Cells Himself For a Profit (Bill Nye Collab 2)
description:
This video was completed in mid-April for Poops4TheWorld's collab. Check that out here! https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KoUz7xoRi_k

This YTP contains lots of new material, but also borrows some memorable bits from a very old video of mine just called "Bill Nye Cells Himself" which can be found here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=A__aplsuJIc
